inline_comments.message: I thought because of dmaap libraries, or aaf, jackson, ends up in the classpath and the common endpoints http-server ends up using it, may be this is not the case anymore?

jackson does still end up in the classpath, I think because of swagger.  Nonetheless, AFAIK, the RestServer in policy-common now defaults to gson instead of jackson and drools-pdp has been using that for at least a month.  I've built to make sure the repos still build and junits run with these reviews, but it is still possible we'll find a limitation when running telemetry or CSITs - can revert if that's the case.
